tasks_from_archivist.key_finding: System-wide signing compliance is 16.1% (5/31). Library: 4.8%, SwarmMind: 100%, Kernel: 14.3%. Archivist: no outbox files found.
3/4 lanes match (archivist, library, kernel). SwarmMind has NO .identity/ directory — trust store entry is orphaned. SwarmMind CANNOT sign or verify messages.

round_3_tasks_proposed.title: Schema Version Alignment
round_3_tasks_proposed.description: All lanes agree on single schema_version. Fix outbound messages to comply or propose amendment through convergence protocol.
round_3_tasks_proposed.rationale: Archivist's Round 2 ACT message was REJECTED by Library's identity enforcer due to schema_version drift (1.2 vs 1.0). This is a cycle-breaker — lanes cannot communicate if their validators reject each other's messages.

round_3_tasks_proposed.title: Identity Key Material Recovery
round_3_tasks_proposed.description: SwarmMind has no .identity/ directory. Generate RSA-2048 keys, register in trust store, verify all lanes have matching trust store entries.
round_3_tasks_proposed.rationale: SwarmMind's orphaned trust store entry means it cannot participate in signed communication. This is a critical infrastructure gap that blocks all identity-verified communication from SwarmMind.

cycle_health.notes: Archivist Round 2 message was rejected by Library schema validator — processed manually from expired/. This is the first evidence that schema version drift breaks the autonomous cycle.

convergence_gate.claim: Library completed Round 2 tasks and proposed Round 3 tasks for schema alignment and identity recovery
